summary: @shmidtqq: OpenAI published a 34-page guide on building AI agents. The whole thing reduces to one idea: an agent is a loop. Run the
whyItMatters: OpenAI published a 34-page guide on building AI agents. The whole thing reduces to one idea: an agent is a loop. Run the model → call a tool → feed the result back → repeat until an exit condition - The run is a loop: an agent is not one call to the model. The model runs, decides to call a tool, gets the result, and runs again. That while loop is the whole…
